Interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters5

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control parameters to the build seamlines operation.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("A8CD2C5E-9687-4BF4-A573-876E9B4CDED0")]
public interface IBuildSeamlinesParameters5 : IBuildSeamlinesParameters4, IBuildSeamlinesParameters3, IBuildSeamlinesParameters2, IBuildSeamlinesParameters
